hp_cost.label: HP cost on use
hp_cost.desc: User loses a percent of max HP when using this ability.

swap.label: Swap active creature
swap.desc: Swaps the active creature on each selected side with their bench (if alive). Triggers after the ability resolves.

lifesteal.label: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heals the user for a percent of damage dealt.

cleanse.label: Cleanse
cleanse.desc: Removes selected categories (statuses / positive stat mods / negative stat mods) on selected targets.

execute_scale.label: Scale damage by target missing HP
execute_scale.desc: Power is multiplied by up to (1 + scaleAmount) as the target's HP drops to 0.

pierce.label: Ignore part of target Defense
pierce.desc: Defense is multiplied by (1 - defReduction) before damage calc.

status_synergy.label: Bonus damage if target has status
status_synergy.desc: Power is multiplied by powerMult if the target already has the chosen status.
